name: Square Catalog Item
description: A CatalogObject instance of the ITEM type, also referred to as an item, in the catalog. Represents a product or service that a seller offers for sale.

name.description: The item's name. This is a searchable attribute for use in applicable query filters.

description.description: The item's description as plain text.

description_html.description: The item's description as expressed in valid HTML elements.

abbreviation.description: The text of the item's display label in the Square Point of Sale app. Only up to the first five characters of the string are used.

label_color.description: The color of the item's display label in the Square Point of Sale app. This must be a valid hex color code.

is_taxable.description: Indicates whether the item is taxable (true) or non-taxable (false). Default is true.

category_id.description: The ID of the item's category, if any. Deprecated: use categories instead.

ordinal.description: The order of the category within the item.

categories.description: The list of categories that this item belongs to.

tax_ids.description: A set of IDs indicating the taxes enabled for this item.

modifier_list_id.description: The ID of the CatalogModifierList controlled by this CatalogModifierListInfo.

min_selected_modifiers.description: The minimum number of modifiers that must be selected from the modifier list.

max_selected_modifiers.description: The maximum number of modifiers that can be selected from the modifier list.

enabled.description: Whether the modifier list is enabled for this item.

modifier_list_info.description: A set of CatalogItemModifierListInfo objects representing the modifier lists that apply to this item.

id.description: The unique ID for the catalog variation object.

type.description: The type of this object, always ITEM_VARIATION.

item_id.description: The ID of the CatalogItem associated with this item variation.

sku.description: The item variation's SKU, if any.

upc.description: The universal product code (UPC) of the item variation, if any.

pricing_type.description: Indicates whether the item variation's price is fixed or determined at the time of sale.

price_money.description: The item variation's price, if fixed pricing is used.

track_inventory.description: If true, inventory tracking is active for the variation.

sellable.description: Whether this variation can be sold.

stockable.description: Whether stock of this variation can be counted.

variations.description: A list of CatalogItemVariation objects for this item. An item must have at least one variation.

product_type.description: The product type of the item. Once set, the product_type value cannot be modified.

skip_modifier_screen.description: If false, the Square Point of Sale app will present the CatalogItem's details screen immediately, allowing the merchant to choose CatalogModifiers before adding the item to the cart.

item_option_id.description: The unique id of the item option.

item_options.description: List of item options IDs for this item. Used to manage and group item variations in a specified order. Maximum: 6 item options.

image_ids.description: The IDs of images associated with this CatalogItem instance.

sort_name.description: A name to sort the item by. If unspecified, the regular name field is used for sorting.

reporting_category.description: The reporting category associated with this item.

id.description: The ID of the reporting category.

ordinal.description: The order of the reporting category.

channels.description: The channels where this item is available.
